parameters.name: phases
parameters.description:
- PodPhaseUnknown: PodUnknown means that for some reason the state of the pod could not be obtained, typically due
to an error in communicating with the host of the pod.
 - PodPhasePending: PodPending means the pod has been accepted by the system, but one or more of the containers
has not been started. This includes time before being bound to a node, as well as time spent
pulling images onto the host.
 - PodPhaseRunning: PodRunning means the pod has been bound to a node and all of the containers have been started.
At least one container is still running or is in the process of being restarted.
 - PodPhaseSucceed: PodSucceed means that all containers in the pod have voluntarily terminated
with a container exit code of 0, and the system is not going to restart any of these containers.
 - PodPhaseFailed: PodFailed means that all containers in the pod have terminated, and at least one container has
terminated in a failure (exited with a non-zero exit code or was stopped by the system).

GetMeshPluginResMeshMode.description:
- MESH_MODE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type.
 - HOSTED: Hosted means that the mesh control plane was hosted by us.
which works as primary-remote mode, other workload cluster can
connect to this control plane cluster as a remote cluster role.
 - DEDICATED: Dedicated means that the mesh control plane are installed directly,
which can only manage the resources of current cluster,
CAN NOT work with primary-remote mode.
 - EXTERNAL: External means that the mesh is create managed by user manually,
we just connect to it.

issuer.title: jwt iss field verification. If not set, there will be no verification.

audiences.title: jwt aud field verification, if not set, it will not be verified

NacosServiceInstancePluginsHealthy.title: - UNKNOWN: not connected - HEALTHY: healthy - UNHEALTHY: disconnected

contentType.description: The HTTP Content-Type header value specifying the content type of the body.

data.description: The HTTP request/response body as raw binary.

extensions.description:
Application specific response metadata. Must be set in the first response
for streaming APIs.

apigeneralv1alpha1ServiceType.description:
- SERVICE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: This is only a meaningless placeholder, to avoid zero not return.
 - ClusterIP: ClusterIP means a service will only be accessible inside the cluster, via
the cluster IP.
 - NodePort: NodePort means a service will be exposed on one port of every node, in
addition to 'ClusterIP' type.
 - LoadBalancer: LoadBalancer means a service will be exposed via an external load balancer
(if the cloud provider supports it), in addition to 'NodePort' type.
 - ExternalName: ExternalName means a service consists of only a reference to an external
name that kubedns or equivalent will return as a CNAME record, with no
exposing or proxying of any pods involved.
apigeneralv1alpha1ServiceType.title: ServiceType string describes ingress methods for a service

apihostedv1alpha1ServiceType.description:
- GOVERN_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type.
 - SPRING_CLOUD: SpringCloud app.
 - DUBBO: Dubbo app.

hostedv1alpha1Grade.description: - THREAD: Number of concurrent threads - QPS: QPS
hostedv1alpha1Grade.title: Current limiting mode

hostedv1alpha1ResourceType.description: - RESOURCE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type. - VIRTUAL_SERVICE: Virtual service - DESTINATION_RULE: Target rule - GATEWAY: Gateway rule - SERVICE_ENTRY: ServiceEntry type. - ENVOY_FILTER: EnvoyFilter type. - PROXY_CONFIG: ProxyConfig type. - SIDECAR: Sidecar type. - WORKLOAD_GROUP: WorkloadGroup type. - WORKLOAD_ENTRY: WorkloadEntry type. - AUTHORIZATION_POLICY: Authorization policy - PEER_AUTHENTICATION: Peer authentication - REQUEST_AUTHENTICATION: Request authentication - WASM_PLUGIN: WasmPlugin type. - TELEMETRY: Telemetry type.

hostedv1alpha1Strategy.title: - Director: direct - ASSOCIATION: association - LINKER: link

@type.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message. This string must contain at least
one "/" character. The last segment of the URL's path must represent
the fully qualified name of the type (as in
`path/google.protobuf.Duration`). The name should be in a canonical form
(e.g., leading "." is not accepted).

In practice, teams usually precompile into the binary all types that they
expect it to use in the context of Any. However, for URLs which use the
scheme `http`, `https`, or no scheme, one can optionally set up a type
server that maps type URLs to message definitions as follows:

* If no scheme is provided, `https` is assumed.
* An HTTP GET on the URL must yield a [google.protobuf.Type][]
  value in binary format, or produce an error.
* Applications are allowed to cache lookup results based on the
  URL, or have them precompiled into a binary to avoid any
  lookup. Therefore, binary compatibility needs to be preserved
  on changes to types. (Use versioned type names to manage
  breaking changes.)

Note: this functionality is not currently available in the official
protobuf release, and it is not used for type URLs beginning with
type.googleapis.com.

Schemes other than `http`, `https` (or the empty scheme) might be
used with implementation specific semantics.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

 The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

failApi.title: List of APIs that failed to execute

enabled.title: Online and offline status true means online, false means offline
API online and offline status true means online

jwtPolicy.title: JWT policy -> If the front end does not transmit it, the back end will be enabled by default

domainIpPolicyStatus.title: Domain level black and white list enabled status

failOpen.title: If true, it will succeed quickly. Even if the authentication server cannot respond, the request will be forwarded to the upstream service. Generally, it should not be set to true.

requestBodyBufferSettings.title: Specifies the configuration used to send the body of the client request to the authorization server.

context.title: The routing level verification context will be merged with the domain name level and sent to the authentication server. If the keys are the same, the domain name level value will be overwritten.

v1alpha1AuthorityRuleStrategy.description: - AUTHORITY_WHITE: white list - AUTHORITY_BLACK: black list
v1alpha1AuthorityRuleStrategy.title: Authorization type

disabled.title: Whether the API under this domain name disables authentication by default

context.title: Additional context passed to the authorization server

caSecretNamespaceName.title: The namespace of the verified ca certificate

skipClientCertValidation.title: Skip authentication, keep the fields, all are false for now, and will be used in combination with the authentication server later.

v1alpha1ClusterPhase.description:
- CLUSTER_PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: The cluster state is unspecified.
 - ClusterPhaseUnknown: The cluster state is unknown.
 - ClusterPhaseCreating: The cluster is being created.
 - ClusterPhaseRunning: The cluster is running.
 - ClusterPhaseUpdating: The cluster is updating.
 - ClusterPhaseDeleting: The cluster is being deleted.
 - ClusterFailed: The cluster operations failed.

v1alpha1ClusterProvider.description:
- GENERIC: Generic
GENERIC indicates other providers
 - DAOCLOUD_KUBESPRAY: DaoCloud
DAOCLOUD_KUBESPRAY indicates a provider of DaoCloud's KubeSpray Engine
 - DAOCLOUD_CLUSTER_API: DAOCLOUD_CLUSTER_API indicates a provider of DaoCloud's Cluster API Engine
 - DAOCLOUD_DCE4: DAOCLOUD_DCE4 indicates a provider of DaoCloud's DCE4 Engine
 - REDHAT_OPENSHIFT4: OverSea Distribtion
REDHAT_OPENSHIFT4 indicates a provider of RedHat Openshift4
 - SUSE_RANCHER: SUSE_RANCHER indicates a provider of SUSE Rancher
 - VMWARE_TANZU: VMWARE_TANZU indicates a provider of VMware Tanzu
 - AWS_EKS: Public Cloud
AWS_EKS indicates a provider of AWS EKS
 - ALIYUN_ACK: ALIYUN_ACK indicates a provider of Aliyun ACK
 - TENCENT_TKE: TENCENT_TKE indicates a provider of Tencent TKE.
 - HUAWEI_CCE: TENCENT_TKE indicates a provider of Huawei CCE.
 - MICROSOFT_AZURE: MICROSOFT_AZURE=11; indicates a provider of Microsoft Azure.

v1alpha1ControlBehavior.title: - FAST_FAILED: Fast failure - WARM_UP: Warm up - WAITING_IN_QUEUE: Waiting in queue

v1alpha1DashboardType.title: - DASHBOARD_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type. - AppsSentinel: Application Sentinel indicator panel - SesameContour: Gateway control plane - SesameEnvoy: Gateway data plane - Nacos: Nacos indicator panel - SentinelDashboard: Sentinel dashboard indicator panel - AppsJvm: Application jvm indicator panel

count.title: Slow call proportion (maximum RT); exception proportion (proportion threshold); number of exceptions (number of exceptions)

v1alpha1DegradeRuleGrade.title: - SLOW_REQUEST_RATIO: proportion of slow calls - ERROR_RATIO: proportion of exceptions - ERROR_COUNT: number of exceptions

trafficPolicy.title: This parameter is used in NodePort, LoadBalancer

lbType.title: The following parameters are only used in LoadBalancer

serviceName.title: Service name is generated according to certain rules

limitApp.title: Targeting the source (default, meaning the calling source is not distinguished)

grade.title: Threshold type (0 is the number of concurrent threads; 1 is qps)

count.title: Single machine threshold, or (average threshold | cluster threshold)

strategy.title: Flow control mode (0 is direct; 1 is association; 2 is link)

controlBehavior.title: Flow control effect (0 means fast failure; 1 means warm up; 2 means waiting in line)

clusterMode.title: Whether to enable cluster flow control

component.title: just a placeholder now, wait for refactor in future

redisUrl.title: If this field is not empty, it means using externally provided redis, otherwise a redis will be created with rls

name.title: The name of the current limiting rule cannot be empty. It is a name generated based on the hierarchical relationship. The levels are separated by "::"

key.title: Current limiting rule key, cannot be empty

value.title: Current limiting rule value, cannot be empty

Unlimited.title: Whether it is in unlimited current mode, true means no current limit

aliasName.title: GatewayRLSRule gateway_rls_rule = 4; The current limit name set by the user, cannot be empty

requestsPerUnit.title: Number of requests allowed per unit time

serviceType.title: Service type (access service or managed service)

api.title: API information associated with the service

mode.title: Service governance model ("Unknown": no governance; "Sentinel": Sentinel governance; "Mesh": Mesh governance)

name.title: The bound grid id and name are the same

hostedTotalRegistryCount.title: Total number of instances in the hosting registry

hostedNormalResCount.title: Total number of normal instances of the hosting registration center

v1alpha1GovernProtocol.description:
- GOVERN_PROTOCOL_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type.
 - GOVERN_TCP: TCP declares the the port uses TCP.
This is the default protocol for a service port.
 - GOVERN_HTTP: HTTP declares that the port carries HTTP/1.1 traffic.
Note that HTTP/1.0 or earlier may not be supported by the proxy.
 - GOVERN_HTTP2: HTTP2 declares that the port carries HTTP/2 traffic.
 - GOVERN_HTTPS: HTTPS declares that the port carries HTTPS traffic.
 - GOVERN_TLS: TLS declares that the port carries TLS traffic.
TLS traffic is assumed to contain SNI as part of the handshake.
 - GOVERN_GRPC: GRPC declares that the port carries gRPC traffic.
 - GOVERN_UNSUPPORTED: UNSUPPORTED - value to signify that the protocol is unsupported.

v1alpha1GrpcRetryOnEnum.description: - canceled: grpc status code is 1 - deadline_exceeded: grpc status code is 4 - internal: grpc status code is 13 - resource_exhausted: grpc status code is 8 - unavailable: grpc status code is 14
v1alpha1GrpcRetryOnEnum.title: GRPC retry condition enumeration

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code to use to abort the Http request.

grpcStatus.description:
GRPC status code to use to abort the request. The supported
codes are documented in https://github.com/grpc/grpc/blob/master/doc/statuscodes.md
Note: If you want to return the status "Unavailable", then you should
specify the code as `UNAVAILABLE`(all caps), but not `14`.

set.title: Header to be adjusted, override exists, creation does not exist

healthThresholdCount.title: The number of successful checks before a service is marked as healthy

path.title: Check the health of the upstream interface path

unhealthThresholdCount.title: Number of failed checks before a service is marked as unhealthy

v1alpha1HostedQuery.description: - ALL: All - NOT_HOSTED: Unhosted - HOSTED: Hosted
v1alpha1HostedQuery.title: Register Configuration Center Hosting Mode

v1alpha1HttpRetryOnEnum.description: - five_xx: 5xx - gateway_error: gateway error - reset: connection reset - connect_failure: connection failure - retriable_4xx: 409 - refused_stream: refused stream - retriable_status_codes: retry based on status code - retriable_headers: retry based on request header
v1alpha1HttpRetryOnEnum.title: HTTP retry condition enumeration

v1alpha1ImagePullPolicy.title: - Always: Always pull - IfNotPresent: There is no pull

diskRead.title: The amount of data read per second from the container group disk

diskWrite.title: The amount of data written to the container group disk per second

netBytesReceived.title: Container group network data acceptance rate

netBytesTransmitted.title: Container group network data sending rate

require.title: The name of the jwt strategy is temporarily passed to the front end forever!

disabled.title: Whether to disable, default is true

default.title: Whether it is the default, temporarily pass true here on the front end.

protocol.title: Port connection protocol->Only supports TCP for now

v1alpha1LB.title: - LEAST_CONN: Minimum number of connections - RANDOM: Random - PASSTHROUGH: Free transparent transmission - ROUND_ROBIN: Polling (default)

v1alpha1LBType.title: LB type, currently only supports MetalLB and Other

v1alpha1LaneStatusPhase.description:
- PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified phase.
 - PHASE_INACTIVE: The traffic lane is inactive.
 - PHASE_ACTIVE: The traffic lane is active.
 - PHASE_ERROR: The traffic lane is error.
 - PHASE_PROCESSING: The traffic lane is processing.
Eg. creating vs or dr.
 - PHASE_DELETING: The traffic lane is deleting.

v1alpha1ListServiceReqServiceType.title: - ALL: All services - SESAME: sesame custom services - K8S: K8S original services

requestHashPolicies.title: Request hash strategy array. It only takes effect if `strategy` is `RequestHash`. It is repeatable. Only one type can appear in each item, and hashIP can only appear once.

v1alpha1LoadBalancePolicyStrategy.title: - Random: random - RoundRobin: rotation training - WeightedLeastRequest: minimum request - Cookie: Cookie (node ​​affinity) - RequestHash: request hash

request.title: Increased number of allowed accesses between units

responseHeadersToAdd.title: Response header for increased current limit

upstreamCluster.title: Upstream host name (backend service host address) svc_ns_port

upstreamProtocol.title: Protocol forwarded to upstream HTTP/1.1 HTTP/2 HTTP/3

responseEndTime.title: Response end time Request start time+duration

v1alpha1MachineType.title: - ALONE: standalone mode - EMBEDDED: embedded mode

path.title: Exact match is currently not supported

httpMethod.title: Request method You can select multiple options

longPolling.title: Configure the number of subscription clients

v1alpha1OrderBy.description:
OrderBy determines the data list order.

 - desc: Desc stands for descending order.
 - asc: Asc stands for ascending order.

consecutiveErrors.title: Number of consecutive errors before outliers

maxEjectionPercent.title: The upper limit of the proportion of outlier pods

v1alpha1OutputFormat.description: - OUTPUT_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type. - YAML: yaml type, the output object will contain the yaml field and no spec field. - SPEC: spec type, the output object will contain the spec field and no yaml field.
v1alpha1OutputFormat.title: In the case of Yaml, the backend uses yaml marshal for serialization, placing the serialized result in a yaml field (a string). In the case of Spec, the backend returns the struct itself, which is not serialized and can be used directly by the frontend.

oldPath.title: Original path is for display only

replacement.title: Rewrite path is required and must start with '/'

clusterNamespaceService.title: Locate the address of a plug-in service

name.title: The name of the current limiting rule cannot be empty. It is a name generated based on the hierarchical relationship. The levels are separated by "::"

key.title: Current limiting rule key, cannot be empty

value.title: Current limiting rule value, cannot be empty

Unlimited.title: Whether it is in unlimited current mode, true means no current limit

aliasName.title: GatewayRLSRule gateway_rls_rule = 4; The current limit name set by the user, cannot be empty

requestsPerUnit.title: Number of requests allowed per unit time

v1alpha1PodPhase.description:
- PodPhaseUnknown: PodUnknown means that for some reason the state of the pod could not be obtained, typically due
to an error in communicating with the host of the pod.
 - PodPhasePending: PodPending means the pod has been accepted by the system, but one or more of the containers
has not been started. This includes time before being bound to a node, as well as time spent
pulling images onto the host.
 - PodPhaseRunning: PodRunning means the pod has been bound to a node and all of the containers have been started.
At least one container is still running or is in the process of being restarted.
 - PodPhaseSucceed: PodSucceed means that all containers in the pod have voluntarily terminated
with a container exit code of 0, and the system is not going to restart any of these containers.
 - PodPhaseFailed: PodFailed means that all containers in the pod have terminated, and at least one container has
terminated in a failure (exited with a non-zero exit code or was stopped by the system).

failOpen.title: If true, it will succeed quickly, even if the current limiting server cannot respond, the request will be forwarded to the upstream service.

enableRateLimitHeaders.title: Whether the response contains X-RateLimit related headers ref. https://tools.ietf.org/id/draft-polli-ratelimit-headers-03.html

global.title: Global traffic restriction strategy - not supported yet

terminal.title: The judgment is terminated. If true, it means no subsequent judgment will be made after the matching conditions are met.

cpu.description: Cpu is the total pod cpu resource. Unit: m.

memory.description: Memory is the total memory resource. Unit: byte.

storage.description: Storage is the total storage resource. Unit: byte.

v1alpha1ResourceList.description:
ResourceList returns a string representation of a resource list in a human
readable format.

limits.title:
Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed.
More info:
https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/
+optional

requests.title:
Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required.
If Requests is omitted for a container, it defaults to Limits if that is
explicitly specified, otherwise to an implementation-defined value. More
info:
https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/
+optional

v1alpha1ResourceRequirements.description: ResourceRequirements describes the compute resource requirements.

count.title: Number of retries, greater than or equal to -1, -1 means disabled

perTryTimeout.title: Retry timeout, only takes effect when the number of retries is greater than 1

retriablesStatusCode.title: Retry status code, 100-599 range, array format, only effective when `HttpRetryOn` includes `retriable_status_codes`

enableGrpc.title: Whether to enable grpc support, after enabling it, it will support the http2 protocol.

v1alpha1RouteType.description: - CLUSTER_SERVER: Cluster service - DIRECT: Direct response - REDIRECT: Redirect - EXTERNAL: External service - REGISTRY: Registration center - UNKNOW: Unknown
v1alpha1RouteType.title: Route type

v1alpha1Rule.title: - RULE_CONN_POOL: circuit breaker - RULE_OUTLIER_DETECTION: outlier detection - RULE_REWRITE: rewrite - RULE_FAULT: fault injection - RULE_RETRY: retry - RULE_TIMEOUT: timeout - RULE_LB: load balancing

name.description: Name of this port within the service. This must be a DNS_LABEL.

protocol.description: Protocol is IP protocol for this port. Supports "TCP", "UDP", and "SCTP".

appProtocol.description: AppProtocol is the application protocol for this port.

port.description: Port will be exposed by this service.

targetPort.description:
TargetPort is the number or name of the port to access on the pods targeted
by the service.

nodePort.description:
NodePort is the port on each node on which this service is exposed when
type is NodePort or LoadBalancer.

v1alpha1ServiceSource.title: - SOURCE_CLUSTER: cluster service - SOURCE_MESH: mesh gateway service - SOURCE_REGISTRY: registration center service - SOURCE_EXTERNAL: external service - SOURCE_HOSTED_REGISTRY: hosted registration center service

nacosNamespaceId.title: namespaceID when the registration center is nacos

nacosGroupName.title: nacos group name when the registration center is nacos

meshId.title: meshID when the registration center is mesh

meshName.title: meshName when the registration center is mesh

meshNamespaceName.title: namespaceName when the registration center is mesh

v1alpha1ServiceStatus.title: - STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified type. - ERROR: Exception - RUNNING: Normal operation - WARNING: Warning

v1alpha1SesameServiceType.title: - EXTERNAL_SERVICE: access service - MANAGE_SERVICE: management service - PLUGIN_SERVICE: plug-in service

version.title: The latest version of the plug-in

disabled.title: Whether the plug-in status is disabled

v1alpha1StatusCode.description:
- Empty: Empty - This code not part of the HTTP status code specification, but it is needed for proto
`enum` type.

subjectName.title: The key expected to be present in the 'subjectAltName' of the provided certificate.

caCertificate.title: ca certificate, the secret of the certificate must contain ca.crt

v1alpha1ThresholdType.title: - SHARED: Single machine share equally - OVERALL: Overall threshold

response.title: Timeout time, the format is number + unit (h, m, s, ms)

address.title: Multiple addresses separated by commas (reserved, can be empty)

enableJWT.title: Is jwt enabled under this domain name?

enableAuth.title: Is the security policy enabled for this domain name?

enableFallbackCertificate.title: Reserved fields, not used for the time being, all values ​​are false

clientValidation.title: Client certificate verification. If left blank, client certificate verification will not be performed.
